landing.headline: Practice.Compose.Play.
landing.lead: Keep your songs, chords and scales in one place, offline-first on your phone. The notebook you should've had from day one.
landing.feature1Body: Build your songs with chords, sections, tempo and structure. All local, never lost.
landing.feature2Body: 50+ chords with voicings, 11 scales on an interactive fretboard. Find inspiration in 2 clicks.
landing.feature3Body: Guided practice with streak, stats and a personal plan. Come back daily, actually improve.
landing.ctaBottomTitle: Tired of playing the same riff for 6 months?
landing.ctaBottomBody: RiffLab is free, offline, no account. Install in 1 click, play in 30 seconds.

dashboard.combineWithScale: Combine it with the {{scale}} scale in {{key}} for {{mood}}.
dashboard.viewScale: View the scale on the fretboard

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageNote: Translation is partial (Phase 5+ for 100%). Static elements default to French.
settings.effects3DNote: Studio hero, amp, floating guitars. Disable if the app lags on your device.
settings.strumSoundNote: The timbre of chords played throughout the app. Click a timbre to test it.
settings.tutorialNote: Replay the app tour. Useful to show RiffLab to someone.
